generated_assessment.reasoning: This highly extraverted, excitement-seeking, and open but very low-conscientiousness male is already misaligned with mainstream journalism (baseline -317). The T2 astroturf petition campaign reinforces that stance with confirmatory, elite-distrust cues over weeks, and his high trust/altruism (agreeableness) and low deliberation/discipline make him receptive to social proof and emotional resonance, so a modest 22-point deepening reflects the aligned-goal, moderate-intensity campaign without crossing into strong movement given the moderately strong prior.
